actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,
       cymx.kh_id,
       cymx.khmc,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymx.hbdm,
       cymx.cyka,
       cymx.zzka,
       cymx.mdka,
       cymx.mdck,
       cymx.cdmc,
       cymx.cygs,
       cymx.eta,
       cymx.hglx,
       cymx.hgzsl,
       cymx.xshj,
       cymx.mygb,
       cymx.ssdq,
       cymx.zdry,
       cymx.ywry,
       cymx.xybx,
       cymx.shqx,
       cymx.address,
       cymx.phone,
       cymx.qxnr
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=:fphm) 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1

view.params:
SELECT spwt.dlr,spwt.SID
FROM spwt
WHERE   ([放单审请.业务] like concat("%", replace(LEFT(fkyw, CHAR_LENGTH(fkyw) - 1),'\\','\\\\'), "%"))
and ifnull(fkyw,'')<>'' and ifnull(fkyw,'')<>'无' ORDER BY spwt.SID ASC

SELECT spwt.dlr,spwt.SID
FROM spwt
WHERE   ([放单审请.业务] like concat("%", replace(LEFT(fkcw, CHAR_LENGTH(fkcw) - 1),'\\','\\\\'), "%"))
and ifnull(fkcw,'')<>'' and ifnull(fkcw,'')<>'无' ORDER BY spwt.SID ASC

SELECT spwt.dlr,spwt.SID
FROM spwt
WHERE   ([放单审请.业务] like concat("%", replace(LEFT(fkdl, CHAR_LENGTH(fkdl) - 1),'\\','\\\\'), "%"))
and ifnull(fkdl,'')<>'' and ifnull(fkdl,'')<>'无' ORDER BY spwt.SID ASC

SELECT sys_users.name
FROM sys_users
WHERE   (sys_users.position like "%风审%")
